name: wechat-article-search
examples_zh: 搜索最近一周微信公众号里关于"AI Agent 工作流"的文章，返回标题、摘要、发布时间和公众号名称。
帮我找 5 篇讨论"新能源汽车出海"的公众号文章，并附上每篇文章链接。
检索"职场沟通技巧"相关微信公众号文章，按发布时间从新到旧列出来源账号和摘要。
examples_en: Search WeChat public account articles from the past week about "AI Agent workflows" and return titles, summaries, publish times, and account names.
Find 5 WeChat articles discussing "new energy vehicle exports" and include the link for each article.
Look up WeChat public account articles about "workplace communication skills", sorted newest first with source account and summary.
